creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-05-02 19:20:41 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11/yeahconsole      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    x11/yeahconsole/files patch-Makefile 
  Log:
  YeahConsole turns an xterm into a gamelike console.
  This means it will slide down from top of your screen
  if you hit a shortcut key.
  
  WWW: http://phrat.de/yeahtools.html
  
  PR:             ports/123252
  Submitted by:   Dmitry Klimov <lazyklimm@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.681     +1 -0      ports/x11/Makefile
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/x11/yeahconsole/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11/yeahconsole/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +37 -0     ports/x11/yeahconsole/files/patch-Makefile (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/x11/yeahconsole/pkg-descr (new)
